title: Tech Career Fair 2026
summary: Meet recruiters and explore internships and full-time roles.
description: Join the annual Tech Career Fair where top companies recruit talented students. Network with industry professionals, explore internships and full-time roles, and learn about careers in software engineering, data science, product management, and more.

title: Annual Spring Festival
summary: Music, food, games, and campus energy.
description: Celebrate spring with live performances, food trucks, arts vendors, and interactive games. This free event is a great way to unwind, meet people, and enjoy campus life.

title: Guest Lecture: AI & Future
summary: A speaker session on AI trends and careers.
description: Hear from a leading AI researcher on the future of machine learning, ethical considerations, and career paths in artificial intelligence.

title: Campus Startup Pitch Night
summary: Student founders pitch ideas to judges and mentors.
description: Watch student teams present startup ideas to investors and experts. Get inspired, network, and learn how campus ventures grow.

title: Student Art Exhibition
summary: Student paintings, photos, and digital work.
description: Explore paintings, sculptures, photography, digital art, and mixed media created by student artists from across campus.

title: Wellness & Mental Health Workshop
summary: Tools for stress management and student wellbeing.
description: Join licensed counselors for practical strategies on mindfulness, time management, and campus support resources.
